zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Dickinson於1370年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Anthonye Dickensonne25歲，母親Catherine de la Pole16歲。他於從1388年到1390年與Margaret Cooper在英國越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1441年在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Dickinson于1370年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Anthonye Dickensonne25岁，母亲Catherine de la Pole16岁。他于从1388年到1390年与Margaret Cooper在英国越可爾赫爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1441年在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dickinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Dickenson , a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Dicun a pet form of Richard (see Dicken ) + son.
History: Jonathan Dickinson, the first president of the College of New Jersey (now Princeton), was born in Hatfield, MA, in 1688. Both his parents came from pioneer Connecticut Valley stock.

variants.name: Dickenson
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dicun, a pet form of Richard (see Dicken ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Dickinson was born in 1370, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anthonye Dickensonne, was 25 and his mother, Catherine de la Pole, was 16. He married Margaret Cooper from 1388 to 1390, in Hull, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1441, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Dickinson est né en 1370, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anthonye Dickensonne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine de la Pole, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cooper du 1388 au 1390, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1441, à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Dickinsonが1370年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Anthonye Dickensonneは25歳，母Catherine de la Poleは16歳であった。から1388年まで1390年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルでMargaret Cooperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1441年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Dickinson(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthonye Dickensonne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de la Pole(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1388년 부터 1390년 까지 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 Margaret Cooper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1441년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Dickinson nasceu em 1370, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anthonye Dickensonne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de la Pole, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cooper de 1388 a 1390, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1441, em Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Dickinson родился в 1370 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anthonye Dickensonne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de la Pole, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cooper с 1388 по 1390 в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1441 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
